headline: 4 Gas Utility Stocks Positioned to Benefit Amid Industry Headwinds
summary: Rising competition from other clean energy sources and aging infrastructure can adversely impact the stock operating in the Gas Distribution industry. Yet, strong gas production and increasing demand from data centers will boost prospects of ATO, SWX, BIPC and OGS.
